objective: Train and evaluate a model. The exact task, code, dataset layout, and metrics may change per request.

dataset.description: Optional. Add local files or folders here when a dataset is available before runtime.

llm_instructions: Generate only generated/script.py and structured runtime metadata.
Do not generate a Dockerfile or requirements.txt; extra packages belong in structured metadata.
The generated payload will be statically analyzed and reviewed by a second LLM before execution.
Preserve explicit user requirements exactly, including framework, accelerator, epoch count, dataset, metrics, and expected artifacts.
The container must write all artifacts to /outputs.
If no dataset is supplied, the script must either create a small synthetic dataset or fail with a clear message explaining what data is required.
Keep paths generic. Do not assume dog_vs_cat, cats, dogs, training_set, or test_set unless the job spec explicitly asks for them.
